name: Tiny Trouble VR- Demo
summary: Tiny Trouble VR lets you become one with a bird in VR, racing through the sky from a thrilling first-person perspective. Stand on its back, guide its flight, and prepare for future modes where your bird becomes a partner in exploration and battle.  This game requires Hand Tracking to be enabled on the device. On Meta Quest 3S / Quest 3, users can enable it by going to Settings → Movement Tracking and turning on "Hand & Body Tracking".
